creator: davide@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi you both.
I'm not able to reproduce this as per r251026.
root@dirichlet:/home/davide # sysctl hw.acpi.cpu.cx_lowest
hw.acpi.cpu.cx_lowest: C3
